title: Terrible Claw
description: Every shadow hides something that breathes...
body:
PLEASE READ THE DESCRIPTION! IT DOESNT CONTAIN SPOILERS BUT IT CONTAINS WHAT THE ULTIMATE GOAL OF THE MOD

There is a config to change the spawnrates within the configuration files incase you want to change spawnrates since they are somewhat slow.

Please report bugs or crashes in the comments or discord link below! Thank you.


IF YOU'RE USING SHADERS PLEASE USE SHADERS THAT SUPPORT BLINDNESS AND DARKNESS EFFECTS WELL!


I reccomend playing this mod with no monsters spawning. You can disable monster spawning using Bad Mobs

 
# ₮ɇɽɽł฿ⱡɇ ₵ⱡ₳₩ Modpage
This mod contains 3 different prehistoric entities with genetic malfunctions causing them to become more hostile.

The smallest entity is afraid of light. Even attacking it with torches can set it on fire.

The second entity is a swifty and quick stalking type of entity. It will try to track you down, so make sure your scent is hidden.

And the largest entity relies on its brute strength. It will always watch from afar and try to get closer. So beaware.

 

## Usable Tools and Lore:

The mod contains a paper full of missions to accomplish, beating the mod. With every mission you complete, you will advance pages to newer missions all the way to mission 5 (Being the Boss fight).

![spear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fd2ef0c84da2b79afb330b0e032813b996297b4.png)
The makeshift spear is a very important tool when it comes to killing these entities. This tool can stun an entity for up to 5-6 seconds and deal 10 damage. The only downside is that it breaks after one use. So make sure you have a lot equiped.


![Hunter' Call](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9f946f50d5f0957d6384738660ca722d7aecadd.png)
The hunter's call is a very dangerous tool towards the player. Right clicking on so will initiate a boss fight against the main entity. By killing the entity, you will obtain its head. You only have 10 minutes to kill the entity so do so quick. The entity will leave if you end up dying to it. ONLY INITIATE IF YOU'RE READY. THIS ENTITY IS VERY STRONG AND DANGEROUS! If you cannot get bones from other sources, you can get them from killing the side entities.


![Shack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02b7c785dfdfcd46289cb0dccc05125f0a57daad.png)
This broken down shack was overtaken and used by the entities within this mod who teamed up to do so. check every piece of storage as there can be lore or useful items. Inside of this building you will find a nest. Do you break this nest or not? If you do so there will be an exhilerating and challanging event waiting for you once you enter a village. STAY PREPARED!


![tent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/781d7f4f3a478a918f1aeedf58831259af0f6290_0.webp)
This camping site contains a book with lore and useful items. It looks super recent like someone was just here. Who knows what could've happened to them? Maybe for now you can use it as a temporary home.


![Project Lab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/563fd0f06d5cbf7dddcfd2eb300df173d3eaf6c5_0.webp)
This building contains 3 books of lore explaining all the questions about the entites. It seems to be a research lab that used to contain them, but eventually power could've went out and they escaped. Most of your questions will be answered as soon as you step into this eerie building where a bloodbath had occured...

 

No spoilers will be told ahead within this modpage. The only way to figure out is to explore within the hostile dinosaur-infested world...
